# Mir Rezwan Navid

> Mir Rezwan Navid combines product strategy, thoughtful design, business insight, and AI to turn complex problems into intuitive, scalable digital experiences.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://rezwannavid.me/): Identity, professional roles, selected projects, and design philosophy.
- [Work](https://rezwannavid.me/work): Product design projects and case-study index.
- [Portfolio 2026](https://rezwannavid.me/portfolio): Downloadable product design portfolio.
- [About](https://rezwannavid.me/about): Professional profile.

## Expertise

Product design, UX design, UI design, product management, design systems, interaction design, user research, prototyping, brand systems, AI product design, and Figma.

## Selected projects

RideCentric+, Global Mission Institute, Drivers App, RideSync, Ruckus Games, Kivo, Hobbit, TygrLabs, and Global Mission Summit.
